parent_sha: ea0c253666f5874391ad5867ebef9e4b90712cb8
commit_subject: Remove project-specific references from the instruction set
Comment audit: scope=.github/instructions/coding-standards-code.instructions.md + .github/instructions/coding-standards.instructions.md + .github/instructions/cpp.instructions.md + .github/instructions/csharp-smells.instructions.md + .github/instructions/csharp-style.instructions.md + .github/instructions/csharp-testing-quality.instructions.md + .github/instructions/csharp-testing-sync.instructions.md + .github/instructions/csharp.instructions.md + .github/instructions/msbuild.instructions.md + .github/playbooks/codebase-architecture-audit/lens-vertical-slice-clean-arch.md + .github/playbooks/instruction-set-maintenance.md + .github/playbooks/library-restructure.md + .github/playbooks/multi-model-review/known-false-positives.md + .github/playbooks/multi-model-review/pr-review-findings-schema.md + .github/playbooks/multi-model-review/pr-review-pattern-catalog-lower-frequency.md + .github/playbooks/multi-model-review/pr-review-pattern-catalog-patterns-12-21.md + .github/playbooks/post-pr-review.md + .github/playbooks/pre-commit.md + .github/playbooks/pre-pr-push.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/HIGH-TIER-SLUGS.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/README.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/audits/last.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/coding-preferences.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/data/panel-misses.csv + .github/pr-quality-gate/panel-policy.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/pattern-catalog.md + .github/pr-quality-gate/pattern-catalog.sources/00-catalog.md + AGENTS.md + README.md + scripts/sync-critical-rules.ps1 + scripts/sync-critical-rules.sh, 0 new comment lines, zero-count justification: de-projectify pass (consuming-project identifiers/provenance replaced with generic role-based placeholders; catalog regenerated) PLUS a 3.14 ASCII purge of the touched DOCUMENTATION files (em/en-dashes to hyphens, ellipses to three dots). The pattern catalog (pattern-catalog.md + 00-catalog.md) IS in the diff scope because the de-projectify regenerated it, but its PRE-EXISTING em-dashes are grandfathered per 3.14's old-catalog-content carve-out and were intentionally NOT normalized (normalizing them would also trip this comment-audit on slug examples that embed HTML-comment marker syntax). A one-line generator-header fix in sync-critical-rules.ps1/.sh makes the regenerated HIGH-TIER-SLUGS.md header ASCII and tool-agnostic (names both the pwsh and bash twins). All edits are markdown prose/example changes plus two generator CODE lines; no source-code comment lines were added or modified.
